title: Feast Online Feature Ops
summary: Build an online feature operations surface with freshness tracking, store visibility, and training-serving consistency checks.
knowledge_base: Feast Online Feature Ops is positioned as a Feature Platform Engineering starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Build an online feature operations surface with freshness tracking, store visibility, and training-serving consistency checks.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on feast, feature-store, mlops, serving.

Production differentiation focus: Turn upstream feature platform engineering capabilities into a production-style application with operations-facing workflows.; Add deployment packaging, monitoring hooks, and screenshot-ready demos instead of notebook-only output.; Connect model behavior to concrete business decisions so the project is easier to evaluate and present.
why_high_score: Official or primary upstream repo with 6964 GitHub stars.

differentiation_hooks: Turn upstream feature platform engineering capabilities into a production-style application with operations-facing workflows.
